nasb.text: Then she let them down by a rope through the window, for her house was on the city wall, so that she was living on the wall.

esv.text: Then she let them down by a rope through the window, for her house was built into the city wall, so that she lived in the wall.

cnv.text: 於是，那女人用繩子把二人從窗戶縋下去，因為她的房屋是在城牆上，她就住在城牆上。

ccb.text: 喇合的房子就在城墙边，她就住在城墙上，于是她用绳子把二人从窗口缒下去，
